creator: olgeni@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

As of now, once webmin is installed it will always remember the 
original operating system version until it is updated by hand, so 
you will have to do it after each upgrade. Actually, very few things 
depend on the specific OS version, especially when upgrading to a 
minor release, so you shouldn't have issues.
